name: OpenClaw Host Git Workflow
description: Host-backed git workflow with bundled skill, single send_to_git entrypoint, and bounded runtime slices for setup doctor, repo-aware planning, branch-aware planning, commit prep, repo resolution, live host node binding, preflight, branch entry, confirmed-plan validation, push, PR creation, checks wait, merge, and sync-main.

nodeSelector.description: Optional host node selector used to bind the bounded workflow to one concrete host node before execution.

hostRepoPath.description: Canonical host-side repository path used for bounded host execution. When set, this takes priority over environment-derived container paths.

pathMappings.description: Optional container-to-host path mappings used when runtime discovery sees a container path but host execution must run against the canonical host repo path.
